The average time from message dispatch to receipt across all target contacts.

c.n: Credibility and comprehensiveness of rating system
c.d: Measures how reliable, user-driven, and detailed the rating feature is within the app, including community participation, weighting, and integration with reviews.
Measures how well the app’s algorithm reflects the true preferences of its users, leading to more personalized recommendations.
Number of active users actively rating and reviewing movies, indicating a vibrant and responsive community.
Size and comprehensiveness of the movie catalog, including titles, cast, crew, and metadata.
Ease of navigating the app and quickly submitting ratings without confusion or clutter.
Consistent experience across iOS, Android, and web platforms, allowing users to rate from any device.

c.n: Coverage of Retailers and Accuracy of Price Comparison
c.d: Measures how comprehensively an app scans across a broad spectrum of retailers (online and brick‑and‑mortar) and how reliably it presents up‑to‑date prices, discounts, and seller ratings for a given item.
The breadth of retailers and brands included in the app's database.
The precision and reliability of the price data displayed for each item.
The frequency and speed at which the app refreshes price and offer information.
The intuitiveness, aesthetics, and ease of navigation of the app.
